title: トレーニングについて

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! It appears your training regimen
is going swimmingly!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I came to check in on things, but... color
me impressed! I see you've been
supporting your trainee with panache!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes. ♪ Keep up the good work and watch
your trainee grow stronger over time!
